nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or insufficient for complex analysis
nodes.grounding_span: AI systems to help brainstorm ideas and or to identify new ideas

nodes.label: AI as objective framework provider with subjective refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as final decision-maker without human context
nodes.grounding_span: initial recommendation is meant to achieve an objective approach...follow-up questions help incorporate subjective elements

nodes.label: AI as blind spot identifier and alternative perspective provider
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to surface-level or traditional approaches
nodes.grounding_span: AI's role is to always provide insight into what other factors of influence may not have been readily identified

nodes.label: AI reliability for data and statistical analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for data and statistical analysis due to lack of contextual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: Data and statistical analysis are particular areas that I am hesitant to rely on AI for

nodes.label: AI as strategic thinking partner and validation check
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent task delegator without human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I'll rarely delegate a specific task to an AI but typically use them as a sounding board

nodes.label: AI conversational memory and coherence
nodes.label_negative: AI lack of conversational memory and coherence
nodes.grounding_span: effectiveness of the AI models to remember elements of the conversation to build new ideas off of

nodes.label: AI accountability and organizational trust
nodes.label_negative: AI lack of accountability and erosion of trust
nodes.grounding_span: inability to hold an AI system accountable for system failures necessitates an additional level of scrutiny

nodes.label: Optimized asset management and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: optimized asset management strategies for maintaining equipment reliability and availability

nodes.label: Organizational accountability and trust
nodes.grounding_span: inability to hold an AI system accountable for system failures necessitates an additional level of scrutiny

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: reliability engineering is meant to influence alignment with organization leadership and work process management

nodes.label: Positive satisfaction with AI as brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: AI systems actually helped develop what became my organization's defined process for evaluating asset criticality

nodes.label: Hesitancy toward AI for statistical analysis
nodes.grounding_span: Data and statistical analysis are particular areas that I am hesitant to rely on AI for

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI's role
nodes.grounding_span: the organization as a whole embraces its usage but cautions against over-reliance

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth dialogue
nodes.grounding_span: refinement is almost always required to incorporate specific elements

nodes.label: Systematic decomposition of problems into objective and subjective layers
nodes.grounding_span: initial recommendation is meant to achieve an objective approach...follow-up questions help incorporate subjective elements
